snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: Project Management and replacement reviewers independently checked the exact nine-path Development candidate, broken baseline reproduction, local official-ZIP evidence, online same-runner and fresh-runner macOS results, unchanged Windows result, dependency adoption, residual trust boundary and status preservation. They returned CLEAR and made no candidate edits.

dimensions.summary: Existing Release Engineering, Quality, Technical Architecture and Playbook sections own the internal distribution seal, official artifact, fresh-runner evidence and still-open trusted-release lifecycle; no new document or product surface is added.

Owners consistently distinguish a complete ad-hoc integrity seal with identity '-' and no Team ID from Developer ID trust, notarization, staple, hardened runtime, entitlements, or a public release claim.
Semantic lock v3 retains 1,184 claims and changes only the existing planned PIGE-REL-001, PIGE-REL-005 and E9.08 projections; every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.

Development gets one executable internal-distribution contract: builder-owned final sealing, zero post-seal Bundle writes, official ZIP equality, credential stripping, strict codesign/Gatekeeper/quarantine checks, and an independent downloaded-artifact runtime smoke.
No Markdown file or durable decision is added; semantic-neutral owner compression keeps all five leanness gates green without raising the 56-file, 1,213,000-byte or 250,000-byte trace budgets.

verification.evidence: The exact nine-path Development plus eight-path governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

macOS build job 87095828643, independent downloaded-distribution job 87096511438 and unchanged Windows x64 job 87095828819 pass. The fresh runner consumes the exact official ZIP/report and proves strict ad-hoc integrity, expected-untrusted Gatekeeper/quarantine behavior and real packaged runtime without staging access.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate has 57 dependency records with zero waivers, including pinned actions/download-artifact v7.0.0; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,184 pass with no status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 of 3,700 entry words, 4,577 trace lines, 249,845 of 250,000 trace bytes and 1,212,864 of 1,213,000 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.compatibility: This candidate repairs the broken inherited macOS linker signature for internal arm64 packageability with a complete ad-hoc integrity seal and fresh downloaded-ZIP verification. It preserves Windows behavior and does not claim Developer ID trust, notarization, signed public distribution, DMG, macOS x64, installed lifecycle or E9.08 completion.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact nine-path bytes after local and online same-runner/fresh-runner evidence. Product Planning synchronized seven pre-recipe existing owner/control paths and this current-only recipe without changing Development files. Independent replacement reviews returned CLEAR.

nonBlockingRisks: The ad-hoc seal supplies integrity and Apple Silicon loadability, not a trusted publisher identity; Gatekeeper remains expected to classify the internal artifact as untrusted.
Users may still encounter an untrusted warning and require the OS-native right-click or System Settings flow; no bypass command is shipped.
Developer ID signing, notarization, staple, hardened runtime, entitlements, DMG, macOS x64 and signed installed-platform proof remain open.
Ad-hoc signature bytes may vary between builds, so ZIP hashes are per-build evidence rather than the stable release identity.
The fresh-runner artifact and reports expire under CI retention; governance binds the reproducible workflow, pinned action and body-free verification contract.
Windows behavior is unchanged; broader Windows/macOS version and hardware matrices remain open.
